svg.text:
First lets talk about how to get a smooth cycle of the walking costumes. To do this we need to know:
* How many frames of animation are there in the walk cycle? (In our case, that's 8)
* How fast do we want to change frames (If we progress onto the next frame as fast as scratch runs our game, then it will change 30 times every second... that's too fast! We will change costumes once every two frames to slow it down.
